steps.title: What Mneme is
steps.narration: Mneme is memory an agent can actually trust. Every turn it records carries provenance, and every recall comes with a receipt for why those memories ranked where they did.
steps.command: echo mneme - accountable agent memory with provenance and re-derivable recall
steps.stdout: mneme - accountable agent memory with provenance and re-derivable recall
steps.output: mneme - accountable agent memory with provenance and re-derivable recall

steps.title: The capability surface
steps.narration: The layers are all here: remember turns, extract grounded atoms, synthesize a persona, and verdict every memory as MATCH, DRIFT, or UNVERIFIABLE. Memory stops being a black box and becomes something you can question.
steps.command: set PYTHONPATH=./mneme/src&& set PYTHONUTF8=1&& python -m mneme --help
steps.stdout:
usage: mneme [-h] [--version] [--state STATE]
             {remember,recall,drift,persona,provenance,scenarios,forget,update,audit,inspect,ingest,chain,supersede,history,entity-graph,consolidate,to-crucible,bench,mcp}
             ...

accountable agent memory

positional arguments:
  {remember,recall,drift,persona,provenance,scenarios,forget,update,audit,inspect,ingest,chain,supersede,history,entity-graph,consolidate,to-crucible,bench,mcp}
    remember            record turns (L0) and extract atoms (L1) with
                        provenance
    recall              retrieve memories with a re-derivable ranking receipt
    drift               verdict every memory's grounding
                        (MATCH/DRIFT/UNVERIFIABLE)
    persona             synthesize a persona (L3) grounded in its atoms
    provenance          show a memory's provenance receipt
    scenarios           cluster a session's atoms into L2 scene blocks
    forget              delete a memory, leaving an auditable tombstone
    update              edit a memory's text, recording before/after in the
                        audit log
    audit               show the hash-chained history of every forget/update
    inspect             render a self-contained white-box HTML view of the
                        memory
    ingest              ingest gather-shaped intake items (JSON) with source
                        provenance
    chain               walk a memory's full provenance chain back to its web
                        source
    supersede           record that a fact CHANGED (keeps the old for history)
    history             the timeline of a fact (current + superseded)
    entity-graph        build a grounded entity graph (typed relations + named
                        entities)
    consolidate         merge near-duplicate memories (audit-tombstoned);
                        surface contradictions
    to-crucible         export memories as a crucible thesis so an independent
                        organ can certify their faithfulness
    bench               token-economics benchmark: reduction AND answer-
                        recall, re-derivable
    mcp                 serve mneme over MCP stdio (agent memory tools)

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --version             show program's version number and exit
  --state STATE         path to the SQLite memory DB (default: mneme.db)
steps.output:
usage: mneme [-h] [--version] [--state STATE]
             {remember,recall,drift,persona,provenance,scenarios,forget,update,audit,inspect,ingest,chain,supersede,history,entity-graph,consolidate,to-crucible,bench,mcp}
             ...

accountable agent memory

positional arguments:

    remember            record turns (L0) and extract atoms (L1) with
                        provenance
    recall              retrieve memories with a re-derivable ranking receipt
    drift               verdict every memory's grounding
                        (MATCH/DRIFT/UNVERIFIABLE)
    persona             synthesize a persona (L3) grounded in its atoms
    provenance          show a memory's provenance receipt
    scenarios           cluster a session's atoms into L2 scene blocks
    forget              delete a memory, leaving an auditable tombstone
    update              edit a memory's text, recording before/after in the
                        audit log
    audit               show the hash-chained history of every forget/update
    inspect             render a self-contained white-box HTML view of the
                        memory
    ingest              ingest gather-shaped intake items (JSON) with source
                        provenance
    chain               walk a memory's full provenance chain back to its web
                        source
    supersede           record that a fact CHANGED (keeps the old for history)
    history             the timeline of a fact (current + superseded)
    entity-graph        build a grounded entity graph (typed relations + named
                        entities)
    consolidate         merge near-duplicate memories (audit-tombstoned);
                        surface contradictions
    to-crucible         export memories as a crucible thesis so an independent
                        organ can certify their faithfulness
    bench               token-economics benchmark: reduction AND answer-
                        recall, re-derivable
    mcp                 serve mneme over MCP stdio (agent memory tools)

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --version             show program's version number and exit
  --state STATE         path to the SQLite memory DB (default: mneme.db)

steps.title: The memory inspector artifact
steps.narration: And this is my favorite part. Mneme renders its entire memory state as a self-contained, offline inspector page. What the agent knows, and why it believes it, laid out for anyone to read.
steps.command: set PYTHONPATH=./mneme/src&& set PYTHONUTF8=1&& python -m mneme --state %TEMP%\mneme-demo.db inspect
steps.stdout:
mneme memory inspector

White-box view of the memory: 0 turns, 0 atoms, 0 scenarios, 0 persona. Every memory shows the turn it came from and its live drift verdict; the audit log below records every forget/update. Offline, self-contained.

atoms (L1)

none

scenarios (L2)

none

persona (L3)

none

turns (L0)

none

audit log — 0 entries chain intact ✓

no forget/update recorded
